initialCoachMessage: Hi! I see you matched with me. How are you feeling today?
disclaimer: This is a private conversation between you and your coach.
emptySubtitle: Write a message to start the conversation.
welcome: Hello! I'm Luna, your friendly guide at The Support Network. I'm here to help you find the right kind of support. Whenever you're ready, tell me a little about what's on your mind.
defaultResponse: Thank you for sharing. I'm here to listen. Would you like to explore some of our support options like coaching or peer communities?
coachResponse: I understand you're looking for professional guidance. We have a wonderful selection of specialized coaches. Would you like to see our coach discovery page?
communityResponse: Connecting with others can be so helpful. Our peer communities are safe spaces to share and listen. Shall I take you to the community groups?
resourcesResponse: Sometimes having the right information is a great first step. I can show you our library of helpful resources. Would that be useful?
